• Responsive 2‑D mining game with mobile controls, HUD gauges, and mod‑able textures.
  • Procedural world generation, ore tiers, AOE mining, explosives, and server/host election.
  • Custom UI system for inventory, shop, settings, and multiplayer chat.
    Game.init()
    Game.draw()

This page creates a canvas‑based mining environment where players move, drill, build blocks, and trade items via MQTT. It includes a full UI overlay (chat, minimap, settings, shop), custom texture handling, sound synthesis, and logic for host arbitration and autosave. The code is split into configuration, rendering, game mechanics, networking, and UI modules.
